summary: Completed testing of Admin Dashboard and Multi-system Accounting Integrations Module. Backend: 26/26 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 12 test scenarios passed (100%). All features fully functional.

issues: Console warning: chart width/height -1 - minor Recharts sizing issue on initial load, does not affect functionality

backend_integrations_api.GET /api/integrations/available-list: PASSED - Returns 6 integrations with correct status (contalink, alegra=available; quickbooks, contpaqi, xero, sap=coming_soon)
backend_integrations_api.GET /api/integrations/connected: PASSED - Returns connected integrations without exposing credentials
backend_integrations_api.POST /api/integrations/connect: PASSED - Creates new integration, rejects coming_soon types, validates credentials
backend_integrations_api.POST /api/integrations/{id}/test: PASSED - Tests connection, returns 404 for non-existent
backend_integrations_api.POST /api/integrations/{id}/sync: PASSED - Triggers sync for CONTALink, returns success with items count
backend_integrations_api.DELETE /api/integrations/{id}: PASSED - Disconnects integration, returns 404 for non-existent

backend_admin_api.GET /api/integrations/admin/all-companie: PASSED - Returns companies with users_count, cfdis_count, integrations, latest_period
backend_admin_api.GET /api/integrations/admin/all-users: PASSED - Returns users without password_hash exposed

frontend_admin_dashboard.summary_cards: PASSED - Shows Empresas(1), Usuarios(2), Integraciones Activas(1), CFDIs Totales(327)
frontend_admin_dashboard.companies_table: PASSED - data-testid='companies-table' with columns: Empresa, RFC, Usuarios, CFDIs, Último Período, Integraciones
frontend_admin_dashboard.company_data: PASSED - Shows COMERCIALIZADORA ORIENTAL TECHNOLOGY with RFC, 2 users, 327 CFDIs, 2024-03 period, CONTALink badge
frontend_admin_dashboard.connected_integration: PASSED - CONTALink Producción shown with Sincronizar button
frontend_admin_dashboard.sync_button: PASSED - Sincronizar button clickable and triggers sync
frontend_admin_dashboard.alegra_connectable: PASSED - Alegra connect button enabled, opens dialog with email/api_token fields
frontend_admin_dashboard.coming_soon_disabled: PASSED - QuickBooks, CONTPAQi, Xero, SAP buttons disabled with 'Próximamente' badge
frontend_admin_dashboard.connect_dialog: PASSED - data-testid='connect-dialog' with label, email, api_token inputs

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data. 1 company, 2 users, 327 CFDIs, 1 CONTALink integration connected
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Dashboard and Integrations Module fully tested. Key data-testids: admin-dashboard, companies-table, connect-dialog, connect-btn-{key}, sync-{id}, disconnect-{id}, available-{key}. Backend endpoints: /api/integrations/available-list (6 types), /connected, /connect, /{id}/test, /{id}/sync, DELETE /{id}, /admin/all-companies, /admin/all-users. CONTALink is connected and syncing works. Alegra can be connected. QuickBooks/CONTPAQi/Xero/SAP are 'coming_soon' and disabled.

admin_dashboard.summary_cards: 4 cards showing Empresas, Usuarios, Integraciones Activas, CFDIs Totales
admin_dashboard.companies_table: Shows company name, RFC, user count, CFDI count, latest period, integration badges
admin_dashboard.integrations_section: Connected integrations with sync/disconnect, available integrations grid

integrations_module.available_integrations: 6 types: CONTALink, Alegra (available), QuickBooks, CONTPAQi, Xero, SAP (coming_soon)
integrations_module.connect_flow: Dialog with label, credentials fields based on integration type
integrations_module.sync_flow: Triggers data fetch from external system (CONTALink trial balance)
